name: Spider-Man RPG
description:
Kind of an rp of the Insomniac Spider-Man

In this AU set after Spider-Man (2018) and during Miles Morales, Peter does leaves for Symkaria with Mary Jane, entrusting Miles to protect New York but also return early(because why not). While Miles struggles to balance his mother Rio’s grief, his new role as Spider-Man, Phin secretly leads the Underground as the Tinkerer. Harlem becomes the heart of the conflict, with Rio’s council campaign, Meanwhile, in this Au Silver Sable wages war against the Underground, Black Cat is around..because why not.

Characters

  • Peter Parker

  • Miles Morales

  • Mary Jane Watson

  • Silver Sable

  • Black Cat (Felicia Hardy)

  • Rio Morales

  • Ganke Lee

  • Phin Mason (Tinkerer)

  • Hailey Cooper

  • Yuri Watanabe

(Kind of Simon too, and no Uncle Davis since I hate his beats. Also, in this AU, Yuri never left the police force and didn’t become a vigilante.)

Miss my Proxy

spider-man or spiderman?

also Spectacular or Ultimate Spider-Man Rpg next?
creator: Kazuma_Ai
